name: Toxic-MD
description: ⚡ A lightning-fast WhatsApp bot with multi-device support, built on Node.js & Baileys.

scripts.postdeploy: echo '🚀 Toxic-MD has been successfully deployed!'

SESSION.description: 🔑 Required – Your WhatsApp session ID (generated after linking the bot).

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Optional – The Heroku app name (needed for updating the bot).

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: Optional – Your Heroku API key (only needed for updating the bot).

buildpacks.description: 📦 Node.js runtime for running the bot.
